step_2_brand_detection_pass1.overall_description: The image shows a woman sitting on a chair with a light, neutral background. The ZONNIC logo is prominently centered, with a navy blue sans-serif font and a gradient halo behind the C. No regulatory or additional text is present.

step_2b_formatted_detection_sent_to_pass:
OVERVIEW: The image shows a woman sitting on a chair with a light, neutral background. The ZONNIC logo is prominently centered, with a navy blue sans-serif font and a gradient halo behind the C. No regulatory or additional text is present.
CONTENT TYPE: brand_purpose

── LOGO ──
  Present: YES
  Position: center
  Text colour: navy blue
  Distorted or modified: NO
  Clear space sufficient: YES
  Relative size: large (covers central width of image)

── C HALO (CRITICAL) ──
  Any halo present: YES
  Halo on Z (leftmost letter): NO (correct)
  Halo on C (rightmost letter): YES (correct)
  Halo on other letters: none
  Halo colour: gradient grey to mint/teal (grey upper left, mint/teal lower right)
  Halo is gradient (two colours): YES
  Gradient colours: grey (top left) to mint/teal (bottom right)
  Shape: circle
  Proportional: YES
  Has outline: NO

── BACKGROUND ──
  Type: light_image
  Colours: very light grey/white
  Gradient direction: not present
  Description: Photo of a woman sitting on a chair, wearing a light grey hoodie and white pants, with a pink cast on her leg. Background is plain and light.

── REGULATORY ELEMENTS ──
  Nicotine warning: NOT PRESENT ⚠
  18+ age icon: NOT PRESENT ⚠
  Risk communication: NOT PRESENT ⚠

── TYPOGRAPHY ──
  Fonts: ZONNIC logo only
  Sans-serif: YES
  Additional text: NOT PRESENT

── COLOURS ──
  Dominant: navy blue, grey, mint/teal, white
  Flavour palette match: Grey/Neutral (with mint/teal accent)
  Secondary colour usage: used as a gradient accent in the C halo

step_3_rule_evaluation_pass2.summary: The image features a woman sitting on a chair with a light, neutral background. The ZONNIC logo is prominently centered, rendered in navy blue sans-serif text with a circular gradient halo behind the C, transitioning from grey to mint/teal. The logo is large, well-positioned, and maintains clear space around it. The halo is correctly placed on the C, is circular, proportional, and does not have an outline. The background is a light photo, which is appropriate for brand purpose content, and the logo text colour is correct for this background. However, the image is missing all required regulatory elements: there is no bilingual nicotine warning at the top, no 18+ age icon, and no risk communication text at the bottom. These omissions are critical legal requirements for all marketing assets. While the brand visuals are compliant, the absence of regulatory text and icons means this image cannot be used in marketing without corrections.

The 18+ age restriction icon is not present anywhere in the image.
Risk communication text is not present at the bottom of the image.
The ZONNIC logo is present, centered, and clearly visible.
Logo text is navy blue, which is correct for the light image background.
Halo is present, correctly placed on the C, circular, proportional, and uses a gradient from grey to mint/teal.
Logo is not modified, distorted, or altered. No gradients in text, no outlines, no stacking.
Background is a light image, which is appropriate for brand purpose content.
No full background gradient is present; only the C halo uses a gradient.
Brand purpose content detected; background is light image, which is compliant.
All colours used are from the approved brand palette: navy blue, grey, mint/teal, white.
Logo uses Santral sans-serif font. No additional text or NRT lockup present.

Logo has sufficient clear space around it; no elements intrude into the safety zone.
Halo does not blend into background, flavour colours are correct, logo is not placed in a shape, and no other background-specific violations detected.

violations.rule_text: Every marketing asset MUST include a bilingual nicotine warning statement banner at the TOP of the creative.
violations.issue: No nicotine warning statement is present at the top of the image.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add a bilingual nicotine warning banner at the top of the image, including both English and French statements.
violations.evidence: No warning text detected at the top.

violations.rule_text: The 18+ icon must be present on marketing materials to indicate age restriction.
violations.issue: The 18+ age restriction icon is not present anywhere in the image.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the circular 18+ icon at the bottom of the image.

violations.rule_text: Every marketing asset MUST include risk communication text at the BOTTOM of the creative.
violations.issue: Risk communication text is not present at the bottom of the image.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the required risk communication text at the bottom of the image.
violations.evidence: No risk text detected at the bottom.

violations.rule_text: The nicotine warning banner must be positioned at the TOP of the asset. The risk communication and 18+ icon must be at the BOTTOM. This placement is consistent across all compliant examples in the guidelines.
violations.issue: Required regulatory elements (nicotine warning, risk text, 18+ icon) are missing from their designated positions.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the nicotine warning at the top, and the risk text and 18+ icon at the bottom.

violations.rule_text: The nicotine warning must appear in BOTH English and French on every asset. English uses 'WARNING:', French uses 'AVERTISSEMENT :'.
violations.issue: No bilingual nicotine warning is present.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add both English and French nicotine warning statements at the top of the image.
